title: AI Agent Solutions for Commercial Real Estate
business_pain: Lease documents (estoppels, amendments, riders) are long, unstructured PDFs. Reviewing them manually leads to missed renewal deadlines, CAM reconciliation errors, and high operational costs.
solution_details: We deploy validation-first document processing pipelines. An AI agent parses the lease PDF, extracts key terms (escalation percentages, renewal windows, default terms) into structured JSON, and flags ambiguities for manual review.
roi_calculation: Reclaims 90% of analyst time spent reading documents. More importantly, it eliminates the risk of missed renewal-notice dates, which can cost hundreds of thousands of dollars in lost leverage.
trust_credentials: Our principal engineer has extensive experience connecting Workday Finance databases with customized LLM pipelines for audit compliance.

title: AI Agent Solutions for Restaurant & Multi-Location Food Service
business_pain: High staff turnover and staffing shortages lead to missed calls, long drive-thru wait times, and lost revenue. Previous automated tools tried to handle every case and failed, leading to poor customer experiences.
solution_details: A natural voice AI agent takes orders over the phone or drive-thru mic. It queries the live POS menu and today's inventory. If it encounters a complex case (e.g., severe allergies, unusual substitutions, or customer frustration), it triggers a deterministic handoff to a human operator.
roi_calculation: Maintains 100% call capture rate, reduces labor requirements during off-peak hours, and increases average order value through consistent, data-driven cross-selling prompts.
trust_credentials: Voice AI expertise derived from building production-grade voice pipelines at Encounter AI.

title: AI Agent Solutions for Investment Management
business_pain: Analysts spend hours copying metrics from earnings call transcripts, 10-Ks, and portfolio reports into spreadsheets before they can start their actual evaluation work.
solution_details: We build custom retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines that ingest filings, parse tabular data precisely, verify extracted numbers against source equations, and produce a structured, reviewed summary memo for the analyst.
roi_calculation: Reclaims hours of preparation work per filing. Validated structures ensure analysts never base investment theses on hallucinated metrics.
trust_credentials: Solid background in mathematical modeling and systems safety (UCSD Electrical Engineering background).
